html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Lhean’s hair has been cycling in waves, a sign her follicles can still switch back on — and the recent baby hairs prove it. Ongoing sleep disruption and thyroid‑related stress, however, keep her scalp in and out of repair mode. This plan focuses on anchoring rest, calming her stress response, and rebuilding strength through nutrition so growth can hold steady. It’s designed for the regrowth start phase — the moment to turn scattered improvements into consistent recovery. 🌱

Steady habits now turn those baby hairs into lasting thickness.
